About

We're building the
researcher graph.

The scientific workforce is one of the least-indexed professional populations on earth. Researchers publish constantly, win grants publicly, file patents — and yet they're completely invisible to the tools sales, recruiting, and investment teams rely on every day.

The problem we're solving

A pharma BD team trying to reach the world's top CRISPR researchers has no reliable starting point. LinkedIn is wrong. ZoomInfo misses academics. Faculty directories are HTML tables with no emails. Conference attendee lists are guarded.

We're aggregating the world's best open research infrastructure — OpenAlex, ORCID, NIH Reporter, PubMed, Semantic Scholar — and turning it into a B2B contact intelligence layer that actually works for the scientific market.

Our moat: industry bridge signals

The most valuable researchers for B2B outreach are those with one foot in industry: patent holders, startup co-founders, SAB members, industry-funded PIs. They're commercially aware, move between academia and industry, and respond to outreach.

We built proprietary signal detection to surface exactly this population — the researchers who bridge the gap between basic science and commercial application.

Data philosophy

01

Open sources only

We only index publicly disclosed information: papers, grants, patents, public institutional pages. No scraping of private university systems.

02

Opt-out respected

Any researcher can request removal. We maintain a global suppression list and honor it across all exports and API calls.

03

Freshness first

We'd rather show fewer records with high confidence than pad the database with stale or unverified contacts.

Team

👤

Co-founder, CEO

Former pharma BD. Spent years trying to reach researchers with broken tools. Built ResearchReach to fix that.

👤

Co-founder, CTO

Previously at a large academic data aggregator. Built pipelines processing billions of research metadata records.

Looking for data engineers and researchers with experience in scientific graph construction. Join us.
